## Summary of Changes

Provide a brief, clear description of what this PR does and why.

---

## Type of Change

Select all that apply:

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that resolves an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Documentation update (README, docstrings, guides, etc.)
- [ ] New vulnerability pattern (adds or updates a Semgrep/Bandit rule or detection logic)
- [ ] New demo application (adds a vulnerable demo app under `demo_apps/`)

---

## Checklist

Please confirm all of the following before requesting review:

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest` or equivalent)
- [ ] New tests have been added or updated to cover the changes
- [ ] Documentation has been updated where applicable (README, INSTALL.md, docstrings)
- [ ] No real credentials, API keys, tokens, or secrets are included anywhere in this PR
- [ ] No `.audit/` output directories or generated report files are committed
- [ ] Commit message(s) follow the Conventional Commits format (e.g. `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, `chore:`)

---
